DP.408.0000:
Dawn: [0103,0001]?!\f
Did you tell your family that you’re
helping the professor?\f
...You didn’t, did you?\f
I know that you’re really eager to
see all kinds of Pokémon.\f
But you shouldn’t make your mom
worry that you’ve disappeared.\f
DP.408.0001:
Dawn: You should go tell your family
that you’re helping the professor.\f
The faster the better, too.\f
DP.408.0002:
Dawn: Oh, that’s right!\f
[0103,0001], I haven’t shown you
how to catch a Pokémon.\f
I’ll demonstrate how to catch 
one, so just watch me, OK?\f
DP.408.0003:
Dawn: Giggle...
See? Isn’t it neat?\f
Actually, it’s better to lower your
target’s HP more than I did.\f
It’s important to get the Pokémon’s
HP down as low as possible.\f
This is because a healthy Pokémon
is very difficult to catch.\f
Oh, Pokémon also get easier to catch
if you make them sleep or something\r
by using a Pokémon’s move.\f
OK, [0103,0000], to get you
started, I’ll give you five\r
Poké Balls!\f
DP.408.0004:
If you have lots of Pokémon with you,
it will be safer on long trips.\f
Plus, it will be a lot more fun
having your Pokémon friends along.\f
OK, I need to get going.
Bye, now!\f
DP.408.0005:
Lucas: [0103,0001]?!\f
Did you tell your family that you’re
helping the professor?\f
...I bet you didn’t, did you?\f
I know that you’re eager to
see all kinds of Pokémon.\f
But you shouldn’t make your mom
worry that you’ve upped and left.\f
DP.408.0006:
Lucas: Why don’t you go tell your
family that the professor asked for\r
your help?\f
You should do it right away.\f
DP.408.0007:
Lucas: [0103,0001], do you know
how to catch a Pokémon?\f
I’ll demonstrate how to catch
one, so just watch, OK?\f
DP.408.0008:
Lucas: And that’s how it’s done.\f
Actually, I should have lowered the
target’s HP some more.\f
Yup, the important thing is to lower
the Pokémon’s HP as much as possible.\f
See, a healthy Pokémon isn’t easy to
catch.\f
Oh, yeah. They also get easier to
catch if you make one of your\r
Pokémon put them to sleep or such.\f
Here, [0103,0000], I’ll give you
five Poké Balls to get you started.\f
DP.408.0009:
If you have lots of Pokémon with you,
you’ll be able to travel farther.\f
That way, you’ll have a better shot
at meeting more Pokémon.\f
See you around!\f
DP.408.0010:
Some Pokémon only appear in the
morning. Some only come out at night.\f
I’m going to keep waiting right here
till I’ve seen every last one of ’em!
DP.408.0013:
Trainer Tips!\f
All Pokémon that are involved in
a battle earn Exp. Points!\f
The more your Pokémon battle,
the stronger they will become.
